creator: meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp
text:
net/xrdp does not accept Windows 7 RDP client.
When I try to connect xrdp server with Windows 7 RDP client,
rdp connection closed after entering password. With Windows XP's RDP client, 
xrdp properly works.

Fix: 

The problem seems to be fixed in xrdp 0.5.0.
This port needs to be updated or would maintainer make the port net/xrdp-devel?
How-To-Repeat: 1. install net/xrdp
2. try to connect to xrdp server with Windows 7 RDP client
3. enter username & password into xrdp's login dialog
4. rdp connection will be closed
